title: Record Voter Turnout in Namakkal
summary: Namakkal recorded one of the highest voter turnouts in Tamil Nadu with strong participation from women and youth.

title: Polling Ends Peacefully
summary: Election polling concluded peacefully across most parts of Namakkal with tight security arrangements.

title: Post-Poll Security Tightened
summary: Police increased patrols in sensitive areas to maintain law and order after polling.

title: Water Supply Issues Trigger Protests
summary: Residents protested over irregular water supply in rural parts of Namakkal.

title: Poultry Sector Faces Labour Shortage
summary: Election activities have led to labour shortages affecting poultry production.

title: Heatwave Advisory Issued
summary: Authorities advised residents to take precautions due to rising temperatures.

title: Gold Prices Show Variation
summary: Gold prices fluctuated in local markets following national trends.

title: Egg Prices Remain Unstable
summary: Egg prices in Namakkal saw minor fluctuations due to supply-demand changes.
